homepage.title: Baroness Caroline Pidgeon MBE
homepage.text_excerpt: Baroness Caroline Pidgeon MBE Baroness Caroline Pidgeon MBE Baroness Caroline Pidgeon MBE is an experienced leader, driving change and improving services in the public, not-for-profit and charity sectors through her career as an elected member, Trustee and Chair. Caroline combines insightful and broad strategic oversight and leadership with a detailed understanding of performance and financial management, risk and audit control, public policy making and diversity and inclusion. Caroline has extensive board and committee experience, alongside a career in NHS communications and local and regional government spanning 30 years. Caroline has been a member of the House of Lords since August 2024. To get in touch, please email: caroline@carolinepidgeon.org To access Caroline's London Assembly Member archived campaign website click here . This website does not use cookies, or capture or track your personal data.
